## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type

<!-- Check all that apply — must match the commit type(s) in this PR -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `style` — formatting, whitespace
- [ ] `build` — build system or dependencies
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD configuration
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance, tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows `type(scope): description` (e.g. `feat(auth): add login page`)
- [ ] I ran the relevant checks locally (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] No unrelated refactors or drive-by formatting in the same PR
